svg.title: ListenBrainz end-to-end data pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Four-layer pipeline: source data, raw layer, transformation layer with dbt, and analytics layer, flowing top to bottom with tools labeled at each stage.

g.text: 1 table · EU region · music listening events
5M rows · one row per listen event
Google Colab · Pandas · Matplotlib · 6 insight charts

svg.text: Tools: BigQuery · dbt Cloud · dbt_utils · Python · Google Colab · GitHub
